title: First Missing Positive Integer
description: Given an unsorted string of integers separated by commas (e.g., '3,4,-1,1'), find the smallest missing positive integer.
inputFormat: A string x of comma-separated integers
hint: Parse the string into integers and dump them into a HashSet for O(1) lookups. Then, start a counter at 1 and keep incrementing until you find a number that isn't in your Set.
